name: saint-quiz
description: Discover which Catholic Saint you most identify with through a personality quiz

scripts.build: npm run build:data && terser public/saints-data-enriched.js -o public/saints-data-enriched.min.js -c -m && terser public/saints-data-quiz.js -o public/saints-data-quiz.min.js -c -m && terser public/quiz.js -o public/quiz.min.js -c -m && node scripts/version-assets.js
